# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: orders
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: orders
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: orders
          image: ghcr.io/example/orders:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payments
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payments
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: payments
          image: ghcr.io/example/payments:1.0.0
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: orders
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: orders
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payments
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: payments
  ports:
    - name: http
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: orders-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: orders
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: orders-authz
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: orders-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: payments
          namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payments-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payments
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: HTTP/1
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta1
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: payments-authz
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  server:
    name: payments-server
  client:
    meshTLS:
      serviceAccounts:
        - name: orders
          namespace: microservices
